item.title: Oh Memories, Where'd You Go
item.description: Two weeks of dogfooding Engram, Weaviate's memory product, in daily Claude Code sessions. This surfaced where a dedicated memory product adds value, and the specific mechanics that prevent integration with coding assistants from working well.

item.title: Multimodal Embeddings and RAG: A Practical Guide
item.description: Multimodal embeddings allow AI systems to search and reason across text, images, audio, and video in their native formats. This blog covers the key intuitions behind how this all works and walks through three practical implementations using Weaviate and Gemini.

item.title: Your Code is Your Schema: Weaviate Managed C# Client
item.description: Use semantic search and RAG in C# with the Weaviate Managed .NET client — attribute-driven schema, type-safe queries, and safe migrations, all in idiomatic .NET.

item.title: Securing Enterprise AI with Weaviate
item.description: A complete guide on how to secure Weaviate enterprise deployments with OIDC, RBAC, and multi-tenant isolation.

item.title: Weaviate 1.36 Release
item.description: This release introduces HFresh vector index (Preview), and brings Server-side Batching, Object TTL, Async Replication Improvements, Drop Inverted Indices, and Backup Restoration Cancellation to general availability.

item.title: Building A Legal RAG App in 36 Hours
item.description: Learn how we built a production-ready, end-to-end RAG application in just 36 hours using the Query Agent and the new Weaviate Agent Skills library.

item.title: Weaviate Authentication & Authorization: A Complete Security Guide
item.description: Learn how to secure your Weaviate vector database with API keys, OIDC, and role-based access control (RBAC). Includes practical examples and setup steps.

item.title: Introducing Weaviate Agent Skills
item.description: Build production-ready agent workflows with a single prompt in Claude Code, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot.

item.title: The Limit in the Loop
item.description: Memory isn't just a feature for AI applications—it's infrastructure. As agents scale, the limited loop of stateless interactions breaks down, and continuity becomes a systems problem that requires active maintenance.

item.title: Weaviate in 2025: Reliable Foundations for Agentic Systems
item.description: 2025 was a defining year for us at Weaviate. Instead of chasing shiny features, we focused on an overarching goal - upgrading our infrastructure and technology in order to better support AI systems.

item.title: We are not your parents’ (and grandparents’) Database
item.description: Why vector databases are here to stay.

item.title: Announcing the Weaviate C# Client
item.description: The Weaviate C# client is now generally available! This release brings a modern and intuitive API for .NET developers, making it easier than ever to build AI-powered applications.

item.title: Weaviate 1.35 Release
item.description: This release introduces Object Time-to-Live (TTL), zstd compression support, flat index RQ quantization, multimodal support with Weaviate Embeddings, runtime configurable OIDC certificates and much more.

item.title: Context Engineering - LLM Memory and Retrieval for AI Agents
item.description: Context engineering is how AI agents manage LLM memory—selecting, retrieving, and organizing context from short-term and long-term memory to improve reliability in production.

item.title: AWS 2025 Rising Star Technology Partner
item.description: Weaviate recognized by AWS Partners in Benelux as leaders in helping customers drive innovation

item.title: Announcing the new Weaviate Java Client v6
item.description: The Weaviate Java client v6 is now generally available! This release brings a completely redesigned API that embraces modern Java patterns, simplifies common operations, and makes working with vector databases more intuitive than ever.

item.title: Bringing RAG to Life with Dify and Weaviate
item.description: Learn how to use the Dify and Weaviate integration to build RAG applications.

item.title: Weaviate 1.34 Release
item.description: 1.34 introduces flat index support with RQ quantization, server-side batching improvements, new client libraries, Contextual AI integration and much more.

item.title: Weaviate security release - Medium and High severity fixes for CVE-2025-67818 and CVE-2025-67819
item.description: Weaviate announces two CVEs that are fixed in updated versions of our product.

item.title: From Kitchen Experiments to Five Star Service: The Weaviate Development Journey
item.description: What building AI apps with Weaviate and cooking have in common? Let’s find out!

item.title: Evals and Guardrails in Enterprise workflows (Part 3)
item.description: Hands-on patterns: Design pattern for gen-AI enterprise applications, with Arize AI.

item.title: Unleash Real-Time Agentic AI with Streaming Agents on Confluent Cloud and Weaviate
item.description: Learn how Confluent’s Streaming Agents and Weaviate combine real-time context with semantic understanding for agentic AI.

item.title: A Simpler, More Transparent Pricing Model for Weaviate Cloud
item.description: Weaviate Cloud gets an updated pricing model.

item.title: Legacy data to RAG : Modernise Your Apps with Amazon Sagemaker Unified Studio
item.description: A guide to seamlessly transform data sitting in lakes and warehouses for GenAI capable applications

item.title: When Good Models Go Bad
item.description: A strategic guide to the costs, risks and rewards of upgrading embedding models in production AI

item.title: Rethinking Vector Search at Scale: Weaviate's Native, Efficient and Optimized Multi-Tenancy
item.description: Learn how Weaviate's native multi-tenancy architecture delivers scalable vector search with one shard per tenant, dynamic resource management, and true data isolation.

item.title: Weaviate 1.33 Release
item.description: 1.33 brings compression by default for optimal resource utilization, powerful 1-bit rotational quantization (RQ), streamlined server-side batch imports, enhanced OIDC group management, and collection aliases become generally available (GA).

item.title: Building Multi-Agent Systems with Crew AI and Weaviate
item.description: Learn about how you can build multi-agent systems with CrewAI and Weaviate.

item.title: Evals and Guardrails in Enterprise workflows (Part 2)
item.description: Hands-on patterns: LLM-as-Judge with LangChain and W&B

item.title: Weaviate is now ISO 27001 compliant
item.description: Announcing Weaviate has achieved ISO 27001 compliance.

item.title: Search Mode Benchmarking
item.description: Learn how Search Mode compares against Hybrid Search on the BEIR, LoTTe, BRIGHT, EnronQA, and WixQA Information Retrieval benchmarks.

item.title: Accelerating Data Workflows with Query Agent, now GA
item.description: The Query Agent is now generally available! Learn how the interface to databases is shifting with the introduction of agentic retrievers – domain experts at using Weaviate’s APIs with your data.

item.title: Using Weaviate Cloud Queries in MacOS apps
item.description: A practical guide on using Weaviate Cloud Queries in MacOS apps.

item.title: Chunking Strategies to Improve LLM RAG Pipeline Performance
item.description: Learn how chunking strategies improve LLM RAG pipelines, retrieval quality, and agent memory performance across production AI systems.

item.title: 8-bit Rotational Quantization: How to Compress Vectors by 4x and Improve the Speed-Quality Tradeoff of Vector Search
item.description: Get spun around by our new vector quantization algorithm that utilizes the power of random rotations to improve the speed-quality tradeoff of vector search with Weaviate.

item.title: Evals and Guardrails in Enterprise workflows (Part 1)
item.description: Evals and Guardrails in enterprise workflows part 1

item.title: Elysia: Building an end-to-end agentic RAG app
item.description: Elysia is an open-source, decision tree-based agentic RAG framework that dynamically displays data, learns from user feedback, and chunks documents on-demand. Built with pure Python logic and powered by Weaviate, it's designed to be the next evolution beyond traditional text-only AI assistants.

item.title: Why, When and How to Fine-Tune a Custom Embedding Model
item.description: Key consideration for customizing an embedding model through fine-tuning it on company- or domain-specific data to improve the downstream retrieval performance in RAG applications.

item.title: Build enterprise workflows with Langchain and Weaviate v3
item.description: LangChain and Weaviate v3 power scalable AI with fast, type-safe RAG workflows, practical code, and future-ready features like LLM eval and event-driven design.

item.title: AI Agent Workflow Automation with n8n and Weaviate
item.description: You can now use Weaviate with n8n for no-code agentic workflows. This article teaches you how.

item.title: Weaviate 1.32 Release
item.description: 1.32 adds collection aliases for no-downtime collection migrations, efficient & powerful rotational quantization (RQ), GA replica movement, memory reduction with compressed HNSW connections and more!

item.title: Introducing the New Weaviate Confluent Apache Kafka® Connector: Real-Time Vector Data Pipelines Made Easy
item.description: Learn about the new certified Weaviate Confluent Apache Kafka Connector!

item.title: Latency and Weaviate: Choosing the Right Region for your Vector Database
item.description: Design for speed, build for experience.

item.title: Introducing Glowe: Agent-Powered Korean Skincare Routines
item.description: Glowe is a Korean beauty recommendation app that uses domain knowledge agents, custom embedding strategies, and vector search to create personalized skincare routines. Try now: https://www.glowe.app/

item.title: How We Are Building the Core of the AI-Native Stack
item.description: How Weaviate's day zero, day one, day two mindset helps developers build AI-native applications.

item.title: How Constella Uses Weaviate for Vector Search (RAG) and Cross-Platform Syncing across Devices for Consumer Apps
item.description: How we built cross-platform vector search and syncing for a thinking tool using Weaviate, RAG, and multi-tenant architecture.

item.title: Secure AI for Healthcare: HIPAA-compliant vector search with Weaviate
item.description: Announcing Weaviate Enterprise Cloud new HIPAA compliance on AWS, enabling secure PHI storage, search, and vector-powered AI for healthcare workloads.

item.title: The Art of Scaling a Vector Database like Weaviate
item.description: Master the art of scaling a vector database like Weaviate.

item.title: Unleashing AI Factories: Weaviate and NVIDIA Turbocharge Vector Search with GPU Acceleration
item.description: Learn how Weaviate and NVIDIA enable fast, scalable vector search for agentic AI.

item.title: More efficient multi-vector embeddings with MUVERA
item.description: Weaviate `1.31` implements the MUVERA encoding algorithm for multi-vector embeddings. In this blog, we dive the algorithm in detail, including what MUVERA is, how it works, and whether it might make sense for you.

item.title: Weaviate 1.31 Release
item.description: 1.31 adds MUVERA for multi-vector embeddings, new BM25 operators, the ability to add new object vectors, and more!

item.title: The State of Enterprise AI in 2025: Measured Progress Over Hype
item.description: What trends we see arise in Enterprise AI in 2025.

item.title: Build Scalable Gen AI Data Pipelines with Weaviate and Databricks
item.description: Learn how to build generative AI data pipelines at scale with Weaviate and Databricks

item.title: Exploring RAG and GraphRAG: Understanding when and how to use both
item.description: Learn when and how to use GraphRAG and how it can improve on some search tasks

item.title: Introducing the Weaviate Personalization Agent
item.description: Learn about how you can use our new agentic personalization service to provide user-catered recommendations from Weaviate collections.

item.title: An Overview of Late Interaction Retrieval Models: ColBERT, ColPali, and ColQwen
item.description: Late interaction allow for semantically rich interactions that enable a precise retrieval process across different modalities of unstructured data, including text and images.

item.title: Weaviate 1.30 Release
item.description: Read about BlockMax WAND and multi-vector embeddings in GA, API-based user management, RAG improvements, xAI model support, and more!

item.title: Introducing the Weaviate Transformation Agent
item.description: Learn how the new Transformation Agent will change the way we manage data. Say goodbye to the tedious tasks of database management!

item.title: What Are Agentic Workflows? Patterns, Memory, Use Cases, and Examples
item.description: Agentic workflows combine AI agents, tools, and agent memory to create adaptive systems. Learn the core patterns, use cases, and real-world examples.

item.title: Introducing the Weaviate Query Agent
item.description: Learn about the Query Agent, our new agentic search service that redefines how you interact with Weaviate’s database!
